name: Sweet 'n' Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: Small Green Peppers, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork shoulder into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Seed and cut green peppers into 1-inch pieces.
3. In a bowl, mix brown sugar, soy sauce, salt, pepper, and ginger.
4. Add cornstarch to the mixture and stir until smooth.
5. Place pineapple chunks in a serving dish.
6. Pour the sweet and sour sauce over the pork cubes and green peppers.
7. Cook on low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve with frozen pea pods.
